body:
Hi,

Following up on my ticket, the 5:45 a.m. alarm is still not holding. I reset the schedule twice and both times it reverted to 6:30 on its own, which wipes out the only quiet stretch I get before the rest of the house is moving. Device is an Android 13, if that helps narrow it down. I can send screenshots of the current alarm settings if useful., Kelly West

Update: switching the app's battery setting to Unrestricted (Settings > Battery > App Power Management) and re-saving the 5:45 alarm fixed it. It has held through a full charge cycle. Marking this resolved., Kelly West

Hi,

The Breville drip maker I ordered arrived and setup went fine, but the hazelnut profile is pulling bitter no matter the grind size. I'm using a lighter house blend, not a dark roast. Can someone walk me through a calibration reset, or is this a unit defect?

Kelly West

Update: dropping the brew temperature to 196°F and using the pre-infusion (hold brew three seconds before releasing) fixed it. First cup this morning was exactly right. Thanks, marking resolved.

Kelly West
